{"code":"(def sentry-issues (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"}))

(def max-users-issue (apply max-key :users_affected sentry-issues))

(def service (:project max-users-issue))

(def sentry-id (:id max-users-issue))

(def sentry-title (:title max-users-issue))

{:service service :sentry-id sentry-id :sentry-title sentry-title}"}
